---
title: "symmetries"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`symmetries.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/symmetries.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `impose_Thalf_symmety` {#impose_thalf_symmety}

```python
def impose_Thalf_symmety(C: np.ndarray, p: Literal[1, -1]) -> np.ndarray
```

Impose the symmetry of the correlator at T/2.

Args:
    C: Input correlator array.
    T: Temporal extent.
    p: Parity, must be 1 or -1.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/symmetries.py#L7){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
